EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ISpatialReferenceFactory

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that create different kinds of spatial reference components.

[Guid("6CD10B60-C4F6-11D1-BC92-0000F875BCCE")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ISpatialReferenceFactory

Methods

CreateDatum(int)

Creates a predefined datum.

IDatum CreateDatum(int datumType)

Parameters

datumType int

Returns

IDatum

Examples

Sample Snippet

CreateESRISpatialReference(string, out ISpatialReference, out int)

Creates a spatial reference system and defines it from the specified ESRISpatialReference buffer.

void CreateESRISpatialReference(string spatRefInfo, out ISpatialReference SpatialReference, out int cBytesRead)

Parameters

spatRefInfo string
SpatialReference ISpatialReference
cBytesRead int
